text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...There's somewhere I have to go after the race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's a few words I want to say to her once I've got victory in hand.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yo, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What do you want, O Queen of the Amazons?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't make it weird, Beast.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha, what are you sulking for? You started it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Anyway, how do you plan on running now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if you realize it or not, but the way
you run is having an impact on others.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I know 'cause that includes me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Are your prepared to shoulder that kind of
responsibility?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...That's why I'm going to get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was influenced by someone else, the same as
you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is the Twinkle Series, where only those with
conviction gather.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because we have the drive to
continue running that we keep fighting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. So that means you're hungry for more,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll keep challenging you. I've got no
interest in boring races, after all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Even after you've got no one left to chase, I'll be coming for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. You and me, one-on-one. For as
long as we both can stand.
